adhesion_v2_3000K_melt.method: 3000K melt-quench -> amorphous SE on crystalline NCM, CIF start, 5 seeds

results.comp3_to_5: PBC artifact due to SE rhombo 5x1x1 vs NCM 3x3x1 lattice mismatch ±20%

adhesion_v2_3000K_melt.trend: comp1(1.107) > comp2(1.046) -> Br up, Wad down within Li6 family

protocol: 9. Wad = (E_ncm + E_se - E_int) / A  (isolated slab method)

Li6_v5_xyshift.ISSUE: SE 208at on 351 A² → 0.59 at/A² — SE가 NCM 위에 넓게 퍼짐, SE 밀도 낮음!

Li5.4_v5_xyshift.notes: SE 248at on 179 A² → 1.39 at/A² — 정상 밀도

cell_matching.density_mismatch: comp2B SE density (0.59) = comp4의 43%! → Wad cross-comparison NOT fair

Li6_original.notes: original plan, not used in v5_xyshift

z_cuts_DEPRECATED.reason: z-shift cuts crystalline SE slab -> dangling bonds -> extreme variance

xy_shift.method: SE xy fractional shift (PBC safe), no z cut, 5 seeds per comp
xy_shift.notes: SE slab NOT cut, only NCM-SE registry varies. Running on V100.

vacuum_sensitivity.finding: UMA gives nonphysical energies with large vacuum
vacuum_sensitivity.cause: UMA trained on bulk/dense systems. Large vacuum = out of distribution.
vacuum_sensitivity.solution: Always use vacuum=30A, expand cell on separation

vacancy_adhesion_mechanism.Li6_no_vacancy: Surface Li saturated -> no extra NCM bonding -> Wad lower
vacancy_adhesion_mechanism.Li5.4_vacancy: Under-coordinated Li near vacancy -> chemical anchor -> pulls NCM O2- -> Wad higher
vacancy_adhesion_mechanism.evidence: Expect Li5.4 xy-shift variance > Li6 variance (vacancy creates site-dependent bonding)
